b.label: u, a_epsilon, b (Weierstrass-model coordinates)
b.standard_term: depressed-cubic (Tschirnhaus) substitution coordinates putting the curve in short Weierstrass form

evidence.label: DBP parameters m_epsilon, n_epsilon, A_epsilon, B_epsilon
evidence.summary: m_\epsilon=\frac{2-\epsilon s}{4}, \qquad n_\epsilon=\frac{4-3\epsilon s}{8}, \tag{1.1} ... A_\epsilon=3+2\epsilon s, \qquad B_\epsilon=2+2\epsilon s. \tag{1.2}

evidence.label: DBP complete-integral values I_epsilon
evidence.summary: I_\epsilon = -t^7 \left[ A_\epsilon\Pi(n_\epsilon;m_\epsilon) -B_\epsilon K(m_\epsilon) \right], \tag{1.6} with I_- interpreted as a Cauchy principal value on the real path.

evidence.label: Alternate closed form of the anti-invariant coefficient
